caption: A man with grey, styled hair, glasses, and black headphones sits in a recording studio setting. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with yellow suspenders and a red bow tie. He is positioned in front of a black microphone, speaking and gesturing with his left hand. Behind him is a woman with bright pink hair wearing a green dress, standing near a backdrop that features the word "UNIQUE" and the word "FASHION." To the right, a framed picture hangs on a white wall. The red and white text "BOSS TALK 101" and a logo that reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" are overlaid on the screen. As the scene progresses, the man continues speaking into the microphone, shifting his gaze and adjusting his posture slightly while remaining focused on the recording process.
